lines: Nkunda kwizigira Yesu,Nkajya mwumvira rwose, Ngo njye nishingikiriza Ku masezerano ye.
Yesu, Yesu, ndakwizeye: Ur' uwo kwiringirwa  Yesu, Yesu mwiza nkunda,
Nkunda kwizigira Yesu :Nkizwa n'amaraso ye. Nishyize mu ruzi rwayo, Nogamo, ndatungana.
Nkunda kwizigira Yesu,Nkaruhuk' intambara Y'ibicumuro n'ibyaha, Akamp' umunezero.
Mpimbawe n'uko nkwizeye,Mutabaz' undengera; Nizeye k' umpora hafi; iteka
